title: Market Day (Burwood)
description: FREE Lunch, Giveaways and Fun! Join us for an afternoon of connection, community, and campus fun at Burwood. Explore the wide range of student clubs on offer, meet new people, and discover opportunities to make the most of your university experience. There'll be free lunch, art activations, plenty of giveaways as well as the chance to meet and mingle with other students. Whether you're looking to make friends, join a DUSA Club, or try something different – this is an event you won't want to miss!

title: Wii Sports Competition (Warrnambool)
description: Come and join the fun! Play against staff and students for bragging rights. Free pizza too (first in, best dressed). Walk-in event, but bring your friends along!

title: Employer Showcase (Waurn Ponds)
description: Join the DeakinTALENT Employer Showcase to meet graduate employers, discover what they value in candidates, sharpen your networking skills, and uncover exciting career opportunities.

title: Enviro Ball
description: 🪩 ENVIRO BALL IS BACK ✨! After a year away, our ball returns — and it's at SEA LIFE Melbourne Aquarium 🪸🌊 Tickets are live now 🎟 Join us on 6 August for an amazing night in the aquarium 🐬🐡🐠🦈🐧🐋 with food and drinks, a DJ, secret performances, and our famous raffle and charity auction (party for a good cause!) with lots of environmentally-friendly giveaways to win. Your ticket covers a 3-course meal and drinks package (alcoholic and non-alcoholic options), entry to our charity raffle and auction (100% of proceeds to three charities), a wide selection of prizes and hampers, and a best-dressed prize for our Deep Sea Soiree theme (formal dress code). Strictly 18+ (valid ID required on arrival); please drink responsibly. We can't wait to see you at the 2026 Enviro Ball! 🥂🪩

title: Belonging Art Competition
description: What does belonging mean to you? Share your personal, family or community story through art. Create an original piece that creatively reflects the theme: 'A Million Stories: The Art of Belonging'. Open now until 7 July 2026.

title: AusWISE Walkathon
description: Walk & Connect: Build Your Network, Grow Your Career, Find Your Community 🚶‍♀️💼🌏 Join AusWISE for a Walkathon bringing together Melbourne's international student and multicultural community for a morning of connection, career growth, and good company. Guided by Dr Prabodh Malhotra, it's a relaxed, open-air space to build real professional relationships, meet people who get your journey, and walk away with a stronger network and a sense of belonging. Why join? 🤝 Network with industry-minded peers · 📈 Boost your employability through genuine career conversations · 🌏 Connect with a supportive multicultural community · 🌳 Enjoy Princes Park's beautiful green spaces. Every participant gets a 🎁 goodie bag, 👕 AusWISE t-shirt and 🔥 grilled food on the day. Spaces are limited — get your tickets now!
